metadata.title: AsyncDispatchResponse — standard 202 response for all async-dispatch endpoints

description: Standard 202 Accepted response body returned by every async-dispatch POST endpoint (POST /v1/audit/run, POST /v1/fix/run/{fix_id}, POST /v1/census/run, POST /v1/sync/run, etc.). Callers use href to poll for the completed run record. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class AsyncDispatchResponse.

run_id.description: UUID of the newly created run row. Use this to poll the GET endpoint.

status.description: Initial status of the dispatched run. Always 'pending' at dispatch time.

href.description: Relative URL of the GET endpoint for this run (e.g. /v1/audit/runs/{run_id}). Callers poll this until status is 'completed' or 'failed'.
